kalakriti_assignment_edition_scope_uidx.name: kalakriti_assignment_edition_scope_uidx
kalakriti_assignment_edition_scope_uidx.where: "kalakriti_assignment"."center_id" IS NULL AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_category_id" IS NULL AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_id" IS NULL

kalakriti_assignment_scope_chk.name: kalakriti_assignment_scope_chk
kalakriti_assignment_scope_chk.value:
("kalakriti_assignment"."responsibility"::text IN ('edition_admin', 'volunteer_coordinator', 'overall_events_lead', 'food_lead', 'food_member', 'transport_lead', 'logistics_lead', 'logistics_member', 'awards_lead', 'awards_member', 'venue_lead', 'venue_member', 'hospitality_lead', 'hospitality_member', 'media_member', 'fundraising_member')
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."center_id" IS NULL
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_category_id" IS NULL
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("kalakriti_assignment"."responsibility"::text IN ('liaison', 'transport_coordinator')
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."center_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_category_id" IS NULL
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("kalakriti_assignment"."responsibility"::text = 'competition_category_lead'
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."center_id" IS NULL
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_category_id" IS NOT NULL
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("kalakriti_assignment"."responsibility"::text IN ('competition_coordinator', 'competition_volunteer')
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."center_id" IS NULL
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_category_id" IS NULL
          AND "kalakriti_assignment"."competition_id" IS NOT NULL)

reimbursement_rejection_reason_chk.name: reimbursement_rejection_reason_chk
reimbursement_rejection_reason_chk.value: ((status = 'rejected'::reimbursement_status) AND (rejection_reason IS NOT NULL)) OR ((status <> 'rejected'::reimbursement_status) AND (rejection_reason IS NULL))

team_event_active_root_startTime_id_idx.name: team_event_active_root_startTime_id_idx
team_event_active_root_startTime_id_idx.where: cancelled_at IS NULL AND series_id IS NULL

team_event_end_after_start_chk.name: team_event_end_after_start_chk
team_event_end_after_start_chk.value: end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= start_time

vendor_payment_rejection_reason_chk.name: vendor_payment_rejection_reason_chk
vendor_payment_rejection_reason_chk.value: ((status = 'rejected'::vendor_payment_status) AND (rejection_reason IS NOT NULL)) OR ((status <> 'rejected'::vendor_payment_status) AND (rejection_reason IS NULL))

vpt_rejection_reason_chk.name: vpt_rejection_reason_chk
vpt_rejection_reason_chk.value: ((status = 'rejected'::vendor_payment_transaction_status) AND (rejection_reason IS NOT NULL)) OR ((status <> 'rejected'::vendor_payment_transaction_status) AND (rejection_reason IS NULL))
